mapper.select: SELECT id, name, level, address, phone, intro, image, province, city, department_count, doctor_count, follow_count, status FROM t_hospital WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, level, address, phone, intro, image, province, city, department_count, doctor_count, follow_count, status FROM t_hospital WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY follow_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
